name: voiceroom
description: Full-stack real-time voice room — WebRTC + Socket.IO + Fastify + Next.js

scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared && concurrently "pnpm --filter @voiceroom/server dev" "pnpm --filter @voiceroom/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @voiceroom/shared build && pnpm --filter @voiceroom/server build && pnpm --filter @voiceroom/web build
